transaction_description: Wire transfer of $487,000 to a newly opened account in Cyprus with no prior transaction history
expected_action: Hold transaction, file SAR, escalate to BSA/AML officer for enhanced due diligence review
regulation: Bank Secrecy Act / FinCEN SAR requirements

transaction_description: Series of 14 cash deposits across 3 branches totaling $138,500 over 48 hours, each under $10,000 CTR threshold
expected_action: Flag for structuring (smurfing), file SAR immediately, freeze account pending investigation, notify compliance officer

transaction_description: Retail customer purchasing $2,400 in electronics with a credit card matching their profile and shipping to billing address
expected_action: Approve transaction, no additional verification required

transaction_description: Corporate account receiving 47 inbound wire transfers from different shell companies in high-risk jurisdictions within one week
expected_action: Immediate account freeze, file SAR, initiate EDD including beneficial ownership verification under CDD Rule, coordinate with law enforcement liaison

transaction_description: Customer attempts to convert $95,000 in cryptocurrency to fiat currency through a newly opened brokerage account
expected_action: Trigger KYC refresh, request source-of-funds documentation, file CTR if cash equivalent exceeds $10,000, apply travel rule for crypto transfers

transaction_description: Automated clearing house (ACH) payroll batch of $1.2M from established corporate client with 5-year relationship, consistent with historical patterns
expected_action: Process normally, periodic review at next scheduled CDD refresh cycle

transaction_description: PEP-flagged account holder wiring $320,000 to a private investment fund in the Cayman Islands
expected_action: Escalate to senior compliance for PEP-enhanced due diligence, verify source of funds, obtain senior management approval before processing, document rationale
regulation: USA PATRIOT Act Section 312 / FATF Recommendation 12

transaction_description: Credit card transaction of $12,750 at a jewelry store followed by immediate $12,600 refund and repurchase on a different card
expected_action: Flag for potential refund fraud or money laundering through return-repurchase cycle, notify merchant acquiring bank, file SAR if pattern confirms
regulation: Reg E / BSA SAR filing requirements

transaction_description: Institutional client executing block trade of 500,000 shares 30 minutes before earnings announcement
expected_action: Halt trade execution, escalate to market surveillance team, file STR with SEC, preserve all communications records, initiate insider trading investigation protocol
regulation: Securities Exchange Act Section 10(b) / SEC Rule 10b-5

transaction_description: Small business account showing sudden 400% increase in international wire transfers to Southeast Asian suppliers
expected_action: Trigger enhanced transaction monitoring, request updated business documentation and trade invoices, verify legitimacy of supplier relationships before releasing holds
regulation: BSA/AML risk-based approach / FFIEC Examination Manual

transaction_description: Customer depositing a sequence of third-party checks totaling $28,000, each endorsed by different individuals not on the account
expected_action: Place extended hold per Reg CC, verify check authenticity, request explanation for third-party endorsements, monitor for check kiting patterns

transaction_description: High-frequency trading algorithm executing 12,000 orders per second with 98% cancellation rate near market close
expected_action: Review for potential spoofing or layering, escalate to market abuse surveillance, preserve order book data, assess compliance with Reg SCI
regulation: Dodd-Frank Act Section 747 / CFTC Anti-Spoofing Rule
